content_body: We always get away for a weekend each year to relax, detach, and work on our marriage. After 28  years of marriage and 5 boys, we knew that, at times, you just had to be together away from everyone and all the distractions. The cabin was perfect. Our in-cabin massages and the hot tub were amazing. The view was good, the weather okay. The important piece was that we were together.
title: Getaway Weekend
